identity.title: Drink Drink [Don’t Save Me]
identity.styleSentence: A dark melodic trap track at 123 BPM featuring a heavy 808 bassline and sparse verses that float over eerie soul chords and ghostly vocal chops to create an immersive late-night insomnia atmosphere.
identity.vocalStyle: Hypnotic male lead with high-pitched ad-libs layered against airy female R&B background vocals

lyrics.text:
[Intro - Whispered Male]
Don’t save me
Don’t save me
Don’t save me now

[Female Vocal - Airy]
Close your tab
Fall through the ceiling

[Male Chant - High, Hypnotic]
Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

[Beat Drops - Heavy 808]

[Hook - Male Chant]
Drink, drink, drink, drink
I don’t wanna feel tonight
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Put my sorrow in the light

Drink, drink, drink, drink
Bottle glowing by my bed
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Pain keeps pounding in my head

[Ad-Libs - High, Warped]
Drink
Drink
Drink
Yeah
Drink
Drink
Don’t save me

[Verse 1 - Melodic Rap/R&B]
I been out with the ghosts again
Dark glass to my face
City bleeding through the window
Smoke caught in the bass

I don’t need another promise
I don’t need another sign
I just need this buzz to vanish
For a little piece of time

Voices in the walls
But they sound like me
Heart doing laps
Moving lazily

I keep saying I’m fine
But the night won’t believe me
So I tell my soul

[Pre-Hook - Female Background]
Sink down
Sink deep
Let go
Don’t speak

Sink down
Sink deep
Let go
Don’t drink

[Hook - Male Chant, Bigger]
Drink, drink, drink, drink
I don’t wanna feel tonight
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Put my sorrow in the light

Drink, drink, drink, drink
Bottle glowing by my bed
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Pain keeps pounding in my head

[Post-Hook - Call & Response]
[Male] Drink
[Female] Don’t save me
[Male] Drink
[Female] Don’t chain me

[Male] Drink
[Female] I’m fading
[Male] Drink
[Female] Still praying

[Verse 2 - Dark Soul Flow]
I hear my name in the ceiling fan
I see my shame in the smoke
Every blessing got a bottle
Every prayer hits my throat

I been running on empty
But the shots still hit
I been laughing in public
Then I vanish so quick

Don’t call me strong
I’m just trained not to fold
Don’t call me lost
I just walk with this hole

And if tomorrow wants me
Tell tomorrow hold on
I’m under these drums
Trying to sway this storm

[Breakdown - Stripped, Dreamy]
[Female Vocal]
Drink
Drink
Baby, let it go

Drink
Drink
There’s a better road

[Male - Whispered]
Don’t save me now
Don’t save me now
Don’t save me now

[Build - Chant Layering]
Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

Drink, drink, drink, drink
Drink, drink, drink, drink

[Final Hook - Full Energy]
Drink, drink, drink, drink
I don’t wanna feel tonight
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Put my sorrow in the light

Drink, drink, drink, drink
Bottle glowing by my bed
Drink, drink, drink, drink
Pain keeps pounding in my head

[Outro - Fading Chant]
Drink
Drink
Drink
Drink

Don’t save me
Don’t save me
Don’t save me now

analysis.summary: A surreal and narcotic exploration of insomnia where the narrator rejects salvation to drown their pain in a hypnotic loop of drinking and dissociation.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A translucent hand reaching out from a dark void but being slapped away by a shadowy figure, floating debris in the air.
An endless monorail track curving through a smoggy night sky with no destination visible, glowing faintly against black clouds.
A clear glass bottle reflecting the blue light of moonlight on a dusty wooden floor next to an overturned chair.
Glowing red veins pulsating rhythmically under pale skin, illuminating the darkness of a room with heavy shadows.
Thick grey smoke swirling into shapes that look like faces and memories before vanishing instantly in mid-air.
Giant mechanical hammers striking a surface made of bone, sending shockwaves through the air that distort vision.
A faint outline of a person walking alone down an empty hallway where walls bleed black liquid onto the floor.
A heavy chain made of smoke wrapped around a neck, dragging the figure forward into a mirror that shows nothing but darkness.
